title: Postkard
summary: Bootstrapping pattern for pict-application: providers, configuration-only views, lifecycle hooks, and a pluggable form theme.

title: Bookstore Connections
summary: Manage connections to the meadow bookstore test databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite).

title: Complex Table
summary: Rich pict-section-form host with sections, tabular layout, solvers, pick lists, and entity-bundle autofill - a dense target for inspecting with Pict Panel.

title: Theme Playground
summary: Interactive theme builder — live-edit tokens and CSS, upload imagery, watch a representative pict-section component gallery reflow instantly, and export a compiled JSON bundle.

title: Routed App
summary: Multi-page SPA with hash routing, parameterized routes, and a layout shell that swaps content views into a shared container.

title: Code Display
summary: Five read-only syntax-highlighted code blocks rendered with one shared view subclass across every supported language.

title: Code Editor
summary: Live single-file editor bound to AppData with runtime language switching, read-only toggling, and a snapshot output panel.

title: Multi-File Editor
summary: Sidebar-tabbed workspace that swaps many documents through one editor instance with save-on-switch, per-extension language detection, and new/delete file workflows.

title: Connection Form Demo
summary: Interactive showcase for pict-section-connection-form against a five-provider schema fixture.

title: Basic Content
summary: Renders one markdown document with headings, lists, tables, code blocks, KaTeX equations, and Mermaid diagrams via the provider + view pair.

title: Content Showcase
summary: Sidebar-navigable catalog of eleven markdown topics covering typography, code highlighting, KaTeX math, Mermaid diagrams, GFM tables, and images.

title: Expression Solve Explorer
summary: Live tour of the Fable Expression Parser — type an expression or pick from a catalog, watch the step-by-step solve, postfix token stack, and nested-pyramid visualizations repaint in parallel.

title: Simple Cards
summary: Twelve custom PictFlowCard subclasses across six categories — every panel type (Markdown / Template / Form / View), every BodyContent renderer (SVG / HTML / Canvas), wrapped in a multi-page Pict shell with router-driven navigation and a curated sample-graph catalog.

title: Change Tracking
summary: Demonstrates the multi-input evaluate-on-change solver pattern for reacting to several fields at once.

title: Dynamic Analysis
summary: A fruit-nutrition analysis lab with dynamic section injection, solver rewriting, charts, and histograms.

title: Form Editor
summary: Visual manifest editor with sample loader, drag-and-drop reordering, JSON / preview / help tabs, and an extended descriptor property hook.

title: Form Editor (Flex Height)
summary: Form editor embedded in a scrolling page with patched defaults: natural flow instead of fixed viewport height, plus a position:sticky properties panel.

title: Gradebook
summary: An advanced tabular recordset with stacked headers, row labels, dynamic columns, row/column selection, and column sorting — built purely from manifest configuration.

title: NDT Field Test
summary: A nuclear-density-testing field data-collection form with offline persistence and charted results.

title: Scope Mathematics
summary: Shows solvers reaching across scopes to read and combine data from other sections of the form.

title: Simple Table
summary: A minimal tabular forms application demonstrating manifest-driven table layout, reference manifests, and dot-notation access into nested record data.

title: Image Histogram
summary: Drag-and-drop image analyzer that drives six independent histogram views (R/G/B/A, hue, luminosity) with per-bar gradient and rainbow coloring.

title: Simple Histogram
summary: Eight independent histogram views on one page covering selection modes, data binding, per-bar colors, gap filling, and the runtime API.

title: Bookshop
summary: E-commerce demo with route-mapped help, data-attribute tooltips, and F1 toggling for pict-section-inlinedocumentation.

title: Book Viewer
summary: A long-form ten-chapter book rendered with pict-section-content and click-to-edit per section — Mermaid, KaTeX, code, and tables included.

title: Embedded Editor
summary: The smallest useful integration — pict-section-markdowneditor mounted inside a bordered card on an ordinary page, ready to drop into a notes field or comment box.

title: Markdown Editor
summary: The full-featured segmented editor with quadrant buttons, drag-and-drop reorder, rich previews, Mermaid diagrams, KaTeX math, and code highlighting — every default capability turned on.

title: Server Upload
summary: The onImageUpload hook wired to a live Orator backend — paste, drag, or pick an image and the editor inserts a server URL instead of an embedded base64 data URI.

title: Acme Widgets
summary: A branded multi-page app demonstrating the full shell + theme integration — custom brand, custom theme, responsive sidebar, gear menu, and bottom status bar.

title: Bookstore
summary: Practical modal usage in a data-driven inventory app — confirm on delete, double-confirm on bulk delete, custom modals for record details, toasts for feedback.

title: Modal Garden
summary: Interactive feature catalog covering every pict-section-modal primitive: confirm, doubleConfirm, show, toast, tooltip, dropdown, plus the full shell + panels playground.

title: Panel Garden
summary: Visual test-bed for the shell()/addPanel() collapse-tab geometry — every side, multiple thicknesses, corner vs middle anchoring, with live theme switching.

title: JSON Editor
summary: Interactive object editor with inline editing, expand-by-depth controls, and six runtime CSS themes.

title: Photo Example
summary: Deep-zoom image viewer with W3C Web Annotation overlays, drawing toolbar, and a comment side panel.

title: Class Grid
summary: The minimum-viable TuiGrid: ten student records edited via text, select, number, and date-picker editors with currency formatting and solver triggers.

title: Inventory Grid
summary: Config-only inventory table with frozen first column, validated EditorText, address-resolved select dropdown, currency and date formatters, and solver triggers.

title: Invoice Grid
summary: Custom data marshaling: preChangeHandler clamps and rounds input, changeHandler recomputes line totals and applies a discount rule, plus a custom formatter and DOM writes outside the grid.
